rationale: TASK-063 acceptance is satisfied. Cytoscape.js is a runtime dependency served from a local vendor route, the Graph view now builds Cytoscape elements from filtered graph nodes/edges, viewport controls call Cytoscape APIs, tap selection updates the inspector, docs capture the local-first/no-CDN renderer decision, and checks passed.

issues.summary: Rendering was validated through server/asset/code tests, not a real browser automation run; manual visual review via /wiki-ui is still useful.
Cose layout may need tuning for dense graph slices after user visual feedback.
